Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. FREDERICK P. SHEINFIELD, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3872) for defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling, as follows:

NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL THIRD PARTY METROPCS TO PRODUCE RECORDS PURSUANT TO A SUBPOENA SERVED ON IT IS GRANTED. METROPCS IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT RECORDS REFLECTING ALL MOBILE DEVICE ACTIVITY, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO VOICE CALLS, CELL SITES SMS, MMS: AND DATA SESSIONS, INCLDING TIMES ASSOCIATED WITH THOSE ACTIVITIES ON 11/30/19, 12:00 AM TO12/01/2019, 11:59 PM PACIFIC STANDARD TIME (OR ITS EQUIVALENT IN UTC, WHICH WOULD COVER NOVEMBER 30, 2019, DECEMBER 1, 2019 AND DECEMBER 2, 2019), FOR THE FOLLOWING NUMBERS: 415-685-9033 AND 415-724-1369. ALL DOCUMENTS SHALL BE MARKED AS "CONFIDENTIAL" AND SHALL NOT BE DISCLOSED TO ANYONE OTHER THAN THE PARTIES OR THEIR COUNSEL IN THIS MATTER.

Court to sign order submitted by defense counsel.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. FREDERICK P. SHEINFIELD, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3872) for defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted, no opposition filed. MetroPCS shall produce to CCSF the records for 415-808-9851 associated with Cherri Frazier on 11/30/2019 - 12/1/2019, within 20 days.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
